title: Disable the PC Ethernet Controller Connection Authentication
description:
Disable the PC Ethernet Controller Connection Authentication

Disable the PC Ethernet Controller Connection Authentication

You can disable PC (Ethernet) connection authentication. (Connection authentication is enabled by default.)

(1)    Select Epson RC+ 8.0 menu-[Setup]-[System Configuration]-[Controller]-[Preferences].

(2)    Select the [Disable connection password] checkbox.

Click the [Apply] button.

CAUTION	■	Connection
		 will not be secured if the connection authentication is disabled.
		 Please

be
		 very careful when connecting to Internet.
